title: <div>Coming from a long line of small-business owners, I appreciate LA Media Gro
content: Coming from a long line of small-business owners, I appreciate LA Media Group's commitment to servicing the local business market and delivering high quality content at affordable rates. My interests are quite varied and I constantly seek new ways to challenge myself and expand my knowledge in multiple fields. While I have my cornerstone skills, I thoroughly enjoy assisting all the legs and arms of a business in any way that I can! This makes me a valuable candidate because I am adaptable and can fit into any situation to help the team bring the project to the finish line.
